user.title: Create a Virtual Remotes
user.description: Give this remote a name and choose which button entities it should expose as commands.

data_description.name: Shown as the entity name, e.g. Blu-ray Player
data_description.button_entities: Each selected button becomes one command on this remote

names.title: Name the commands
names.description: Enter the command name for each button. These are the strings you pass to remote.send_command.

init.title: Edit button entities
init.description: Add or remove button entities from this remote.

names.title: Edit command names
names.description: Update the command name for each button.
